defaultDescription: Become who you want to be — with your own voice. waQup helps you reshape self-talk and identity.

descriptions.home: Create affirmations, meditations, and rituals in your own voice to reshape your self-talk, identity, and daily state. Practice free forever.
descriptions.howItWorks: See how waQup turns your voice into repeatable rituals for identity change, self-talk transformation, and daily practice. Three steps. Practice free forever.
descriptions.investors: waQup for founding partners — revenue share, no equity dilution. Identity-shift platform with clear unit economics and high upside.
descriptions.ourStory: Why we built waQup — helping people consciously reshape self-talk and identity using their own voice.
descriptions.theScience: How repetition, self-talk, memory, and your own voice work together — grounded in neuroplasticity and voice-memory research.
descriptions.about: Helping people consciously reshape self-talk and identity using their own voice.
descriptions.forTeachers: waQup for teachers and coaches — bring personalised voice practices to your students and clients.
descriptions.forCoaches: waQup for coaches — share private voice practices with clients. Create in minutes, not hours.
descriptions.forCreators: waQup for creators — earn from your content. Your voice, your brand, revenue share.
descriptions.forStudios: waQup for studios — scale voice-based practices. QR codes, in-class access, referral credits.
descriptions.pricing: Simple, transparent pricing. Practice is always free. Credits power creation only.
descriptions.funnels: waQup sales funnels and conversion flows for marketing.
descriptions.launch: waQup is live. Your voice. Your practice. Your transformation.
